# Session Log Template

Sofi creates these automatically in `sessions/` after each study session.

---

```markdown
---
date: YYYY-MM-DD
questions_reviewed: 15
topics: ["topic1", "topic2"]
categories_covered: ["Recall", "Explain", "Apply", "Connect"]
average_score: 0.0
session_duration: 20
---

## Summary

[Brief description of how the session went]

**Strengths:** [topics or categories that went well]

**Areas for improvement:** [topics or categories needing more work]

## Questions Reviewed

| # | Question | Topic | Category | Score |
|---|----------|-------|----------|-------|
| 1 | [question] | [topic] | Recall | 5/5 |
| 2 | [question] | [topic] | Explain | 4/5 |
| 3 | [question] | [topic] | Apply | 3/5 |
| 4 | [question] | [topic] | Connect | 2/5 |

## Reflections

[Optional notes — what was hard, what clicked, what to focus on next]
```

---

## Score reference

| Score | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| 5/5 | Perfect recall |
| 4/5 | Correct with minor hesitation |
| 3/5 | Correct with difficulty |
| 2/5 | Wrong, but answer seemed easy |
| 1/5 | Wrong, but recognized answer |
| 0/5 | Complete blackout |
